questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "inform"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "request"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "apologize"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "confirm"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "threaten"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "encourage"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "repeat"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "quote"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "declare"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "respond"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "conversation"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "reported"?
Choose the best word: She _____d me to try.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She encouraged me to try." — từ đúng là "encourage" (khích lệ).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Please _____ what you said.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Please repeat what you said." — từ đúng là "repeat" (lặp lại).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____d the famous writer.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He quoted the famous writer." — từ đúng là "quote" (trích dẫn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: They _____d the result.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "They declared the result." — từ đúng là "declare" (tuyên bố).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She _____ed quickly.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She responded quickly." — từ đúng là "respond" (phản hồi).

questions.question: Choose the best word: We had a long _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We had a long conversation." — từ đúng là "conversation" (cuộc trò chuyện).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____ that he was tired.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He reported that he was tired." — từ đúng là "reported" (được thuật lại).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Direct _____ uses quotation marks.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Direct speech uses quotation marks." — từ đúng là "speech" (lời nói/bài phát biểu).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She _____ed she was innocent.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She claimed she was innocent." — từ đúng là "claim" (tuyên bố).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____ed that he was busy.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He mentioned that he was busy." — từ đúng là "mention" (đề cập).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He _____ted he was wrong.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He admitted he was wrong." — từ đúng là "admit" (thừa nhận).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She denied taking the money. (_____)
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She denied taking the money." — từ đúng là "deny" (phủ nhận).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: He said he ___ tired.
questions.explanation: Reported speech: present 'am' shifts to past 'was'.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She told me she ___ busy.
questions.explanation: Backshift of 'is' to 'was' in reported speech.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: They said they ___ come the next day.
Complete the sentence: He asked where I ___.
questions.explanation: Reported question uses statement word order, past tense.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She said she ___ finished her work.
questions.explanation: Present perfect shifts to past perfect ('had').

questions.question: Complete the sentence: He told me he ___ help me.
Complete the sentence: She said she ___ English every day.
Complete the sentence: He said he ___ go to the party.
Complete the sentence: They said they ___ seen the film.
Complete the sentence: She asked if I ___ free.
questions.explanation: Reported yes/no question uses 'if' and backshift.

questions.question: Which English word means "thông báo"?
Which English word means "yêu cầu"?
Which English word means "xin lỗi"?
Which English word means "xác nhận"?
Which English word means "đe dọa"?
Which English word means "khích lệ"?
